description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Generate documentation that runs on push to main, on pull requests to main, and on workflow dispatch. In a macos-14 job, check out the repository, set up dependencies, install awscli, doxygen, and graphviz, then generate Doxygen documentation for Slice and C++ in separate directories. Finally, sync the generated documentation to S3 using aws s3 sync, but only on the main branch and not on pull requests.
